description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled dark roof and a white exterior accented by brickwork at the base. The front features a double garage with wooden doors, a covered porch supported by columns, and two blossoming trees flanking the entryway. The side and rear elevations reveal a mix of window sizes, including bay and standard windows, as well as a sunroom or enclosed patio with a glass roof. The landscaping includes additional shrubbery and trees, enhancing the residential feel. The house has a prominent driveway leading to the garage and a fenced area at the back, likely for a garden or patio. Architectural details such as dormer windows, a wraparound porch, and decorative trim contribute to its traditional American suburban style.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a dark gabled roof, white siding, brick accents, a double garage, and landscaped with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entry porch with columns, and two blossoming trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, bay window, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sunroom or enclosed patio, fenced garden area, and multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long, uninterrupted wall, minimal windows, and visible landscaping at the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a decorative main door flanked by blossoming trees
